title: polygala bolbothrix var. pulniensis
intro: Polygala bolbothrix var. pulniensis, a plant species native to the Western Ghats region of India, is an endangered variety of the Polygala genus, commonly known as milkwort. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic activities. The health benefits of Polygala bolbothrix var. pulniensis include the potential to manage diabetes, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. It is often prepared as a decoction or an infusion, and sometimes used in the form of a paste or powder, to leverage its medicinal properties in traditional Ayurvedic and Siddha medicine practices.
